pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh and verifier.py which explicitly check for these filenames in /home/ga/Videos/exhibits/ and evaluate them.
Confirmed via verifier.py which explicitly reads from this file path to validate the JSON manifest.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated video data created by ffmpeg testsrc2 in setup_task.sh. The expected output video files (lobby_2d.mp4, dome_right.mp4, and classroom_anaglyph.mp4) and the JSON manifest path (/home/ga/Documents/spatial_manifest.json) explicitly match the requirements checked by verifier.py and export_result.sh.
